closed_world_scopes: applicant's stated willingness to take the Oath of Allegiance at this interview
applicant's agreement to oath-related commitments at this interview
examiner's determination of attachment to the Constitution at this interview
sources.limitations: Current interview worksheet only. Reflects a single interview snapshot and the examiner's contemporaneous determination; does not cover prior or future dispositions, does not establish underlying facts beyond what was recorded at interview, and cannot support closed-world absence outside the scope of the oath/attachment determination captured on this worksheet.
sources.title: Oath and attachment worksheet
